calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contempt Of Prior Court Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of James A. Quadra In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. Is Current Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Guy Roberts, Jr. Jim Quadra for Anthony Kwiecien.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Petition for Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. is Current Trustee, etc. was taken off calendar. The Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement and the Petition for Approval of Payment of Fees were taken under submission. Mr. Quadra is to prepare the order regarding fees.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Anthony Kwiecien'S Petn. For Approval Of Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreeement
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. Is Current Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. Is Current Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for and with Guy Roberts, Jr. (Trustee/Beneficiary). Maya Sinclair for Anthony Kwiecen (Current Trustee).

Counsel reported that they have an agreement on some of the issues and that they are trying to resolve the outstanding disputes. The Parties agreed to participate in pro bono mediation (order for the same signed in open court). Mediation is to be completed by February 18, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 23, 2011 and the matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Anthony Kwiecien'S Response To Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr Is Current Trustee And Declaration Of James A. Quadra In Support Of Response To Petition; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Moon, Esq. for the Respondent/Moving party Anthony Kwiecien. Paul Melbostad, Esq. for and with Trustee/Beneficiary Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr.

Matter was heard & argued, the Court denied the motion to seal Anthony Kwiecien's response to petition for order confirming that Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. is current trustee and declaration of James a. Quadra in support of response to petition. Matter doesn't rise to the level of
Cal. Rules of Court sets forth as necessary on a motion to seal.
Mr. Moon's office is to forthwith file the redacted response, Mr. Melbostad's office to prepare the order denying the motion to seal, and to submit it to Dept. 204 for signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: N/A

Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. Is Current Trustee

Petition For Order Confirming That Guy Thomas Roberts, Jr. Is Current Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Continued To Nov-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
